description_long: This cake is rectangular and elongated, resembling a single bed with a pillow and a draped blanket, giving it a whimsical, sculpted appearance. The main body of the cake is covered in a smooth, off-white icing, while a textured, flowing layer of icing or fondant mimics the look of a blanket cascading off one side. The pillow detail at the head of the cake is slightly raised and distinct, adding to the realistic bed-like effect. The cake sits atop a dark, round base that contrasts with the light colors of the cake itself. There are no visible decorations such as flowers, writing, or candles, emphasizing a minimalist, themed design. The overall finish is matte with some soft folds and gentle curves in the 'blanket' portion.
description: A rectangular cake styled to look like a bed with a pillow and draped blanket, finished in smooth, off-white icing and set on a dark round base.
description_view_0: Front view shows the cake's bed-like shape, pillow detail, and the blanket draping off the right side.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the length of the cake and the thick, textured blanket icing cascading down the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the cake and the trailing end of the blanket, with less detail on the pillow.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the pillow and the blanket's edge, with the cake's rectangular form clearly visible.
